message:
[medium] algolia: reject base_url overrides with query, fragment, or userinfo

AlgoliaConfig::from_params stored params["base_url"] as Option<String>
verbatim with no URL-shape validation. base_url_policy was only
consulted in provisioning_readiness (advisory — it does not gate
handle_configure). A configure payload like

    {"application_id":"APP","api_key":"K","base_url":"https://app-dsn.algolia.net?leak=x"}

would pass from_params and flow into AlgoliaClient::new where it is
concatenated via format!("{}{path}", self.base_url) in every request
method (client.rs:143/154/166). `?leak=x` would leak on every Algolia
API request with the endpoint path parsed as part of the query.
Userinfo (`https://attacker:pw@app-dsn.algolia.net`) would bake into
every request URL and silently override the X-Algolia-API-Key and
X-Algolia-Application-Id headers.

- New reject_base_url_qfu helper called from AlgoliaConfig::from_params
  (only when base_url is Some — the None default flows through the
  DEFAULT_BASE_URL_TEMPLATE substitution with the pre-validated
  application_id). Rejects userinfo (username or password) and
  query/fragment components at configure time. Host-allowlist
  advisory in base_url_policy is preserved unchanged.
- Five new unit tests: accept clean app-dsn.algolia.net, reject
  query / fragment / userinfo, reject unparseable URL.

Verification: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-review-p7 cargo check -p
fcp-algolia --tests is still blocked by the upstream asupersync main
E0252 regression at src/runtime/waker.rs:128. Algolia diff reviewed
manually: additions use std url::Url accessor calls with FcpError
shapes identical to the surrounding base_url_policy path.

Re-commit after soft-resetting 4e0a7c87 to unstage an unrelated
durable.rs modification from another pane that was folded into the
original commit (likely by a pre-commit hook auto-stage). The
durable.rs changes have been restored to the unstaged state so the
owning pane can commit them cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
